authorized(address).notice: Addresses allowed to mint/burn/lock. Typically VouchRegistry, ScoreRegistry, and the indexer signer.

burnLockedPoints(bytes32,uint64,uint64).notice: Burn `amount` points. The locked-for-vouchId portion is burned first; if amount > locked, the excess is burned from the available balance (this is the "penalty" mechanic).

getPointsEarnedInWindow(bytes32,uint64,u.notice: Sum positive point events for a popId within [fromBlock, toBlock]. Skips events labelled "vouched_for" — only self-earned points count. O(history length); keep windows short or paginate off-chain.

lockedPoints(bytes32,uint64).notice: Locked points per (popId, vouchId). Sum is mirrored in balance.locked.
